creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I think this would be a "won't fix" issue.  Changing the 
dependency will break existing installations that uses 
pkg(8) upgrade, and BerkeleyDB support will be removed 
in the future in favor of lmdb backend anyways.  Moreover, 
new installation that wants a new BerkeleyDB can install 
BerkeleyDB before installing OpenLDAP.
